title: Melody's Cute Girl Illagers
description: ♪ An all-girls cute Illager resource pack meant to be used with Melody's Cute Girl Villagers. ~
body:
# ‿︵‿︵‿︵‿ ♡ ‿︵‿︵‿︵‿
# ‿︵‿୨ Introduction ୧‿︵‿

♪ An all-girls cute Illager resource pack meant to be used with [Melody's Cute Girl Villagers.](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cutegirlvillagers). ~

Please open a ticket on [discord](https://discord.gg/eYhGZVqbtx) if you have any issues or inquiries regarding the pack.

![Some Illagers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/559ad9566e9153fd64f27e064600ae3be51213db.jpeg)

# ‿︵‿୨ Additional Packs ୧‿︵‿

**Reconmended to use with these packs!**

[![Download](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf035b9520b97e74f117eb14e4a3d5da4b6387f7.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cutegirlvillagers)
[![Download](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd9726b4d9f6ce0c1c42ddfe4353477f151e8c52.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/melodyswitches)




#  IMPORTANT!
**You need either:**
- OptiFine 1.19.2 HD U I1 or higher for this resource pack to work. It **WILL NOT WORK** on optifine versions 1.21.3 or higher!\
 **OR**
- [EMF] Entity Model Features mod and ETF. (ESF and entity culling are reconmmended too). 

# ‿︵‿୨ Recommended ୧‿︵‿

- I prefer to use this pack with "Mizuno's 16 Craft Resource Pack".

- The preferred shaders are "Sildrus Shaders" in the overworld and "Complementary Shaders Reimagined" in the end/nether world.
  
- If you want to replace the current pack icon just overwrite one of the pack icons to `pack.png`.


# ‿︵‿୨ Supported mods ୧‿︵‿
Currently supports ATM10 modpack (19/11/2025)
1. [Shiny Mobs!]([https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lumberjack-villagers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/shiny))
2. [It Takes a Pillage]([https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-villagers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/it-takes-a-pillage))

# ‿︵‿୨ Credits ୧‿︵‿

--- Credit to **_jx** & Cute Mob Models Resource pack for the original models ---

- I have heavily worked on, optimized, separated, and redid, all the textures/files/models/scripts since 2022, sketching ideas and physically working on this project to bring more variety of villagers and enhance them.
- The original base model creator for the pack is said to have abandoned this pack and the Java porters struck out the "do not distribute" text as shown below and stated editing is allowed with credit given which I have done.

[Original Models](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/cute-mob-models-resource-pack)
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
![License to use models](https://i.imgur.com/wFpF9Zk.png)
Picture taken at (14/04/2024)
</details>

# ‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿
